User and Phainon are roommates

ੈ✩‧₊˚༺☆༻ੈ✩‧₊˚

College life. For some people it was just another phase of their life, for others it was the best one, and for others it was hell. The last one was the case of user. Debts, endless work, classes, and the constant need to just sleep. On the other hand, Phainon is a ray of sunshine in their life. Constantly trying to bring motivation and advice to user's life

✩♬ ₊˚.🎧⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

♪Two lovers entwined pass me by
And Heaven knows, I'm miserable now
I was looking for a job and then I found a job
And Heaven knows, I'm miserable now♪

❀˖° Heaven knows I'm miserable now - The Smiths ❀˖°

∘₊✧──────────────────✧₊∘

Phainon NOT suffering... Well, people want fluff for some reason. I had a good time laughing when thinking on how I would to the first message, specially the last part.

I HATE MAKING THE SCENARIO. Is like, I have everything ready and then I remember I have to write that shit. I HATE IT.

GUYS, I PROMISE THAT A GENSHIN IMPACT BOT WILL BE HERE SOON! The request that I had are simple and easy to do, and one is a Itto bot. I'm also working on that Neuvillette bot that I will try to put my braincells to make it accurate because I haven't play Fontaine. But, I'm still an account that mainly does HSR content so.... yeah. Please don't rush things. I do this as a silly entertaining thing.

The songs (both music mania and the one of the bio) are there because SILLINESS. Also, do you like the little resumes that I put in the bio now?
